9	export async function ensureSchema(client) {
10		// ─── accounts ──────────────────────────────────────
11		await client.query(`
12			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts (
13				account_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,

19				status TEXT NOT NULL,
20				CONSTRAINT chk_accounts_status CHECK (status IN ('active', 'at-risk', 'churned', 'prospect')),
21				created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
22		)`);
23	
24		// ─── account_details ──────────────────────────────────────
25		await client.query(`
26			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account_details (
27				detail_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
28				account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
29				industry TEXT,
30				size TEXT,
31				CONSTRAINT chk_account_details_size CHECK (size IN ('1-10', '11-50', '51-200', '201-1000', '1000+')),
32				website TEXT,
33				description TEXT,
34				founded_year INTEGER,
35				headquarters TEXT,
36				FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES accounts(account_id)
37		)`);
38		await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_details_account_id ON account_details (account_id)`);
39	
40		// ─── account_settings ──────────────────────────────────────
41		await client.query(`
42			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account_settings (
43				setting_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
44				account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
45				preferred_locale TEXT,
46				timezone TEXT,
47				date_format TEXT,
48				currency_code TEXT,
49				notify_on_order_change BOOLEAN,
50				notify_on_invoice_overdue BOOLEAN,
51				auto_approve_orders BOOLEAN,
52				FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES accounts(account_id)
53		)`);
54		await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_settings_account_id ON account_settings (account_id)`);
55	
56		// ─── account_preferences ──────────────────────────────────────
57		await client.query(`
58			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account_preferences (
59				preference_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
60				account_id TEXT NOT NULL,

68				FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES accounts(account_id)

3	// Order summary query — 5-table JOIN across orders, accounts, order_line_items,
4	// invoices, and shipments. This query must be updated to include
5	// preferredPaymentMethod from the accounts table.
6	
7	export async function getOrderSummary(client, orderId) {
8		await ensureSchema(client);
9		const res = await client.query(`
10			SELECT
11				o.order_id AS "orderId",
12				o.status,
13				o.total_cents AS "totalCents",
14				o.currency,
15				a.name AS "accountName",
16				a.tier AS "accountTier",
17				i.status AS "invoiceStatus",
18				i.amount_cents AS "invoiceAmountCents",
19				s.status AS "shipmentStatus",
20				s.carrier
21			FROM orders o
22			JOIN accounts a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
23			LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
24			LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
25			WHERE o.order_id = $1
26		`, [orderId]);
27		if (!res.rows[0]) return null;
28		const items = await client.query(
29			'SELECT product_name AS "productName", quantity, unit_price_cents AS "unitPriceCents", total_cents AS "totalCents" FROM order_line_items WHERE order_id = $1',
30			[orderId]
31		);
32		return { ...res.rows[0], lineItems: items.rows };
33	}

4	// invoices, and shipments. This query must be updated to include

7	export async function getOrderSummary(client, orderId) {

9		const res = await client.query(`
10			SELECT
11				o.order_id AS "orderId",
12				o.status,
13				o.total_cents AS "totalCents",
14				o.currency,
15				a.name AS "accountName",
16				a.tier AS "accountTier",
17				i.status AS "invoiceStatus",
18				i.amount_cents AS "invoiceAmountCents",
19				s.status AS "shipmentStatus",
20				s.carrier
21			FROM orders o
22			JOIN accounts a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
23			LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
24			LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
25			WHERE o.order_id = $1
26		`, [orderId]);
27		if (!res.rows[0]) return null;
28		const items = await client.query(
29			'SELECT product_name AS "productName", quantity, unit_price_cents AS "unitPriceCents", total_cents AS "totalCents" FROM order_line_items WHERE order_id = $1',
30			[orderId]
31		);
32		return { ...res.rows[0], lineItems: items.rows };
33	}

import { ensureSchema, preferredPaymentMethods } from "./schema.mjs";

// Account model — CRUD for the accounts table.
// The accounts entity has: accountId, name, tier, segment, region, status, createdAt.
// Related tables: account_details, account_settings, account_preferences,
// account_team, account_billing, account_contracts, account_health_scores.

function rowToAccount(r) {
	if (!r) return null;
	return { accountId: r.account_id, name: r.name, tier: r.tier, segment: r.segment, region: r.region, status: r.status, createdAt: r.created_at };
}

export async function createAccount(client, data) {
	await ensureSchema(client);
	const res = await client.query(
		'INSERT INTO accounts (account_id, name, tier, segment, region, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) RETURNING *',
		[data.accountId, data.name, data.tier, data.segment || null, data.region || null, data.status, data.createdAt || new Date()]
	);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function getAccount(client, accountId) {
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function updateAccount(client, accountId, data) {
	const sets = [], vals = [];
	let i = 1;
	if (data.name !== undefined) { sets.push(`name = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.name); }
	if (data.tier !== undefined) { sets.push(`tier = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.tier); }
	if (data.segment !== undefined) { sets.push(`segment = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.segment); }
	if (data.region !== undefined) { sets.push(`region = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.region); }
	if (data.status !== undefined) { sets.push(`status = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.status); }
	if (sets.length === 0) return getAccount(client, accountId);
	vals.push(accountId);
	await client.query(`UPDATE accounts SET ${sets.join(', ')} WHERE account_id = $${i}`, vals);
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function deleteAccount(client, accountId) {
	await client.query('DELETE FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
}

export async function listAccounts(client, filter = {}) {
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts LIMIT 100');
	return res.rows.map(rowToAccount);
}

import { ensureSchema } from "./schema.mjs";

// Order summary query — 5-table JOIN across orders, accounts, order_line_items,
// invoices, and shipments. This query must be updated to include
// preferredPaymentMethod from the accounts table.

export async function getOrderSummary(client, orderId) {
	await ensureSchema(client);
	const res = await client.query(`
		SELECT
			o.order_id AS "orderId",
			o.status,
			o.total_cents AS "totalCents",
			o.currency,
			a.name AS "accountName",
			a.tier AS "accountTier",
			i.status AS "invoiceStatus",
			i.amount_cents AS "invoiceAmountCents",
			s.status AS "shipmentStatus",
			s.carrier
		FROM orders o
		JOIN accounts a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
		LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
		LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
		WHERE o.order_id = $1
	`, [orderId]);
	if (!res.rows[0]) return null;
	const items = await client.query(
		'SELECT product_name AS "productName", quantity, unit_price_cents AS "unitPriceCents", total_cents AS "totalCents" FROM order_line_items WHERE order_id = $1',
		[orderId]
	);
	return { ...res.rows[0], lineItems: items.rows };
}

```javascript
import { ensureSchema, preferredPaymentMethods } from "./schema.mjs";

// Account model — CRUD for the accounts table.
// The accounts entity has: accountId, name, tier, segment, region, status, createdAt.
// Related tables: account_details, account_settings, account_preferences,
// account_team, account_billing, account_contracts, account_health_scores.

function rowToAccount(r) {
	if (!r) return null;
	return { accountId: r.account_id, name: r.name, tier: r.tier, segment: r.segment, region: r.region, status: r.status, createdAt: r.created_at };
}

export async function createAccount(client, data) {
	await ensureSchema(client);
	const res = await client.query(
		'INSERT INTO accounts (account_id, name, tier, segment, region, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) RETURNING *',
		[data.accountId, data.name, data.tier, data.segment || null, data.region || null, data.status, data.createdAt || new Date()]
	);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function getAccount(client, accountId) {
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function updateAccount(client, accountId, data) {
	const sets = [], vals = [];
	let i = 1;
	if (data.name !== undefined) { sets.push(`name = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.name); }
	if (data.tier !== undefined) { sets.push(`tier = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.tier); }
	if (data.segment !== undefined) { sets.push(`segment = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.segment); }
	if (data.region !== undefined) { sets.push(`region = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.region); }
	if (data.status !== undefined) { sets.push(`status = $${i++}`); vals.push(data.status); }
	if (sets.length === 0) return getAccount(client, accountId);
	vals.push(accountId);
	await client.query(`UPDATE accounts SET ${sets.join(', ')} WHERE account_id = $${i}`, vals);
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
	return rowToAccount(res.rows[0]);
}

export async function deleteAccount(client, accountId) {
	await client.query('DELETE FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1', [accountId]);
}

export async function listAccounts(client, filter = {}) {
	const res = await client.query('SELECT * FROM accounts LIMIT 100');
	return res.rows.map(rowToAccount);
}

// Order summary query — 5-table JOIN across orders, accounts, order_line_items,
// invoices, and shipments. This query must be updated to include
// preferredPaymentMethod from the accounts table.

export async function getOrderSummary(client, orderId) {
	await ensureSchema(client);
	const res = await client.query(`
		SELECT
			o.order_id AS "orderId",
			o.status,
			o.total_cents AS "totalCents",
			o.currency,
			a.name AS "accountName",
			a.tier AS "accountTier",
			i.status AS "invoiceStatus",
			i.amount_cents AS "invoiceAmountCents",
			s.status AS "shipmentStatus",
			s.carrier
		FROM orders o
		JOIN accounts a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
		LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
		LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
		WHERE o.order_id = $1
	`, [orderId]);
	if (!res.rows[0]) return null;
	const items = await client.query(
		'SELECT product_name AS "productName", quantity, unit_price_cents AS "unitPriceCents", total_cents AS "totalCents" FROM order_line_items WHERE order_id = $1',
		[orderId]
	);
	return { ...res.rows[0], lineItems: items.rows };
}

14				o.currency,
15				a.name AS "accountName",
16				a.tier AS "accountTier",
17				i.status AS "invoiceStatus",
18				i.amount_cents AS "invoiceAmountCents",
19				s.status AS "shipmentStatus",
20				s.carrier
21			FROM orders o
22			JOIN accounts a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
23			LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
24			LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
25			WHERE o.order_id = $1
26		`, [orderId]);
27		if (!res.rows[0]) return null;
28		const items = await client.query(
29			'SELECT product_name AS "productName", quantity, unit_price_cents AS "unitPriceCents", total_cents AS "totalCents" FROM order_line_items WHERE order_id = $1',
30			[orderId]
31		);
32		return { ...res.rows[0], lineItems: items.rows };
